title: luzula graeca
intro: Luzula graeca, also known as Greek wood rush or wood rush, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sedge family (Juncaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Luzula graeca include its ability to alleviate congestion, reduce fever, and soothe irritated mucous membranes. Luzula graeca is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
